summary: Tested School Receipts feature: (1) Student /my-bookings page School Receipts tab correctly shows only PAID/REFUNDED payments (2 out of 7 total). (2) Download Receipt button on student side generates PDF successfully. (3) Admin SchoolPaymentTracker shows download receipt icon only for PAID/REFUNDED payments. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (phone 9876543210 with 7 payments: 1 PAID, 1 REFUNDED, 1 ACTIVE, 4 EXPIRED)
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Receipts feature fully tested. Student side: /my-bookings page has School Receipts tab showing only PAID/REFUNDED payments with Download Receipt button. Admin side: SchoolPaymentTracker at /admin/school-payments/:schoolId shows FileText icon for PAID/REFUNDED payments only. Receipt PDF generated using jsPDF with student name, school name, amount, transaction ID, status.

tested_features.student_school_receipts_tab_filter: PASS - Tab shows '(2)' count for PAID/REFUNDED only (out of 7 total payments)
tested_features.student_school_receipts_display: PASS - Shows REFUNDED (Test Refund Student ₹2,400) and PAID (Test Student ₹1) receipts
tested_features.student_download_receipt_button: PASS - Button visible and clickable, downloads PDF: OLL_Receipt_Test_Refund_Student_test_refund_061bf7db.pdf
tested_features.admin_download_receipt_paid: PASS - FileText icon visible for PAID payment, downloads PDF: OLL_Receipt_Test_Student_SCH_cc3bde5d_23eebd45.pdf
tested_features.admin_download_receipt_refunded: PASS - FileText icon visible for REFUNDED payment, downloads PDF: OLL_Receipt_Test_Refund_Student_test_refund_061bf7db.pdf
tested_features.admin_no_download_for_other_status: PASS - ACTIVE/EXPIRED/PENDING payments do NOT show download receipt icon

pdf_generation.pdf_contents: OLL header, status badge (PAID/REFUNDED), student details (name, phone, school, grade), payment details (amount, method, transaction ID, order ID), total paid summary, footer
